description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a matte black finish and a minimalist design. The front features a large, high-resolution display with thin bezels, showing a serene landscape wallpaper. The keyboard is compact, with a standard QWERTY layout and a spacious touchpad below. The lid is adorned with a subtle, centered square logo, and the overall build appears slim and lightweight. The sides of the laptop are thin, with no visible ports in the provided views. The device exudes a professional and contemporary aesthetic, suitable for both work and casual use in urban environments.
description: A slim, matte black laptop with a large display, minimalist keyboard, and a subtle logo on the lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a landscape wallpaper, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's thin profile and open screen; no visible ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black lid with a centered square logo; screen and keyboard not visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and open screen; no visible ports.
attribute_brand_logo: A square logo is visible, centered on the back of the lid; it is subtle and monochrome.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a desktop wallpaper with a landscape image.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row; no numeric keypad; standard compact laptop keyboard.
